name: ai-browser-agent
description: AI Browser Agent - Chrome MV3 extension with cloud backend

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w extension && npm run build -w server && npm run copy:extension
scripts.package:extension: npm run build && cd chrome-extension && zip -r -X ../ai-browser-agent-extension.zip .
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w extension && npm run typecheck -w server
